name: Verisys Antivirus API
description: Ask Verisys to fetch a remote file URL and return synchronous malware findings without uploading binary content through Arthur MCP.

auth.hint: Create a Verisys Antivirus API key and send it in the X-Api-Key header.

tools.name: scan_remote_file
tools.description: Synchronously scan a remotely hosted file for malware.

params.name: file_url
params.description: HTTPS URL of the file Verisys should fetch and scan.

params.name: file_name
params.description: Optional filename used when the remote URL does not provide a useful name.
